email.subject: You're in! Here's what happens next...
email.body:
Hey {first_name},

You're officially registered for the AI Business Builder Live Training on March 4th at 8:00 PM EST.

Here's what's about to happen:

Over the next 5 days, I'm going to send you a few emails that will completely change how you think about building an online business.

No theory. No fluff. Just the raw truth about why most people never make it... and what the ones who DO make it are doing differently.

Tomorrow: I'm going to show you the #1 reason you're stuck (and it's not what you think).

See you in your inbox,
Chad

P.S. Save this date/time: March 4th at 8:00 PM EST. You don't want to miss this.
